puzzles.name: Smothered Mate
puzzles.hint: Force the king into the corner with check, then look for a knight fork.

puzzles.name: Knight Fork
puzzles.hint: Find a square where the knight attacks two pieces at once.

puzzles.name: Pin to Win
puzzles.hint: Pin the knight to the king with your bishop.

puzzles.name: Skewer
puzzles.hint: Attack the king along the rank to win material behind it.

puzzles.name: Back Rank Mate
puzzles.hint: Double your rooks on the d-file to exploit the back rank weakness.

puzzles.name: Discovered Attack
puzzles.hint: Advance the pawn to uncover an attack on the bishop.

puzzles.name: Double Check
puzzles.hint: Deliver a double check — the king must move.

puzzles.name: Deflection
puzzles.hint: Sacrifice to deflect the defender of a key square.

puzzles.name: Greek Gift Sacrifice
puzzles.hint: The classic bishop sacrifice on h7 to open the king's defenses.

puzzles.name: Clearance Sacrifice
puzzles.hint: Sacrifice the rook to clear the diagonal for your bishop.

puzzles.name: Zugzwang
puzzles.hint: Black must move but every move loses the opposition.

puzzles.name: Intermediate Move
puzzles.hint: Don't capture immediately — insert a pawn advance first.

puzzles.name: Anastasia's Mate
puzzles.hint: Use the rook to drive the king to the edge where the knight can deliver mate.

puzzles.name: Arabian Mate
puzzles.hint: Rook and knight working together in the corner.
